name: Perfect Christmas Pudding
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Soft bread crumbs (lightly packed down)
recipeInstructions:
1. Snip the stems from the figs using scissors.
2. Snip the figs into small pieces.
3. Heat the figs in milk over the top of a double boiler until they are soft (about 20 minutes). Remove from heat and stir the figs thoroughly until mashed.
4. Add shortening, bread crumbs, sugar, and tapioca to the mashed figs.
5. Sift and measure flour, then sift again with the other dry ingredients.
6. Mix in molasses and chopped walnut meats.
7. Fold in stiffly whipped egg whites.
8. Transfer the batter to a generously buttered 2-quart mold and cover tightly.
9. Steam the mold covered (or individual molds) on a rack in hot water that comes halfway up the side of the mold for 3 hours.
10. Serve piping hot, with a burning red candle on top. Decorate as desired. Serves 8-10.
